prompt: pick the code-reviewer agent from ECC and add it to the dotclaude-self preset

assertions.text: Follows the complete pipeline (browse → evaluate → cross-ref scan → vendor → sidecar → preset → install → verify)
assertions.check: Response covers all major pipeline steps including the cross-reference scan

assertions.text: Runs Step 2.5 cross-reference scan on code-reviewer
assertions.check: Response includes grep commands scanning code-reviewer for dependencies

assertions.text: Creates correct sidecar file type (file component → .source.yaml sibling, not SOURCE.yaml inside folder)
assertions.check: Response specifies code-reviewer.source.yaml as the sidecar path

assertions.text: Uses correct install command (pnpm install:project not pnpm install)
